mapper.select: with upd_pub as ( update pub set details = details || jsonb_build_object('resources', coalesce(details->'resources', '{}') || #{cover}->'resources') where id = #{id} returning * ) select p.id, pi.name, pi.type, p.details || jsonb_build_object('@type', pi.type::text) as details, p.pub_date, pi.serial_number, pi.id as pub_index_id from upd_pub p inner join pub_idx pi on p.pub_idx_id = pi.id

merge into pub_idx as t using ( values (#{pubIdx.id}::bigint, #{pubIdx.data.name}::text, #{pubIdx.data.type}::pub_type, #{pubIdx.data.serial}::text) ) as s(id, name, type, serial_number) on (t.id = s.id) or (t.serial_number = s.serial_number) or (t.name = s.name and t.type = s.type) when matched then update set name = COALESCE(s.name, t.name), type = COALESCE(s.type, t.type), serial_number = COALESCE(s.serial_number, t.serial_number) when not matched then insert (name, type, serial_number) values (s.name, s.type, s.serial_number) returning t.id, t.name, t.type, t.serial_number, merge_action()

merge into pub using ( values (#{pubIn.id}::bigint, #{pubIn.pubDate}::date, #{pubIn.pubIdxId}::bigint, #{pubIn.details}::jsonb) ) as s(id, pub_date, pub_idx_id, details) on (pub.id = s.id) when matched then update set pub_date = COALESCE(s.pub_date, pub.pub_date), pub_idx_id = COALESCE(s.pub_idx_id, pub.pub_idx_id), details = merge_details(pub.details, s.details) when not matched then insert (pub_date, pub_idx_id, details) values (s.pub_date, s.pub_idx_id, s.details) returning pub.id, pub.pub_date, pub.pub_idx_id, pub.details, merge_action()

select pi.id, pi.name, pi.type, pi.serial_number from pub_idx pi
pi.type = #{criteria.type}::pub_type
order by name asc
